questions.question: A king challenged a wise man to name his reward, and the man asked for one grain of rice on the first chessboard square, then to double it on each following square. By the 64th square, the total reaches an astonishing ______ grains over 1,000 times the global rice production!
questions.explanation: Context from Section 25, Chessboard Grains Puzzle.

questions.question: The total reaches an astonishing ______ grains over 1,000 times the global rice production!
questions.explanation: Context from Section 25, Chessboard Grains Puzzle.

questions.question: Those grains were laid end to end, they’d stretch far beyond the ______ galaxy!
questions.explanation: Context from Section 25, Chessboard Grains Puzzle.
